name: guarded-commands-hook
description: Adds a lightweight hook that blocks destructive shell commands.

content.value:
#!/bin/sh
case "$1" in
  *"rm -rf"*|*"git reset --hard"*)
    echo "blocked destructive command" >&2
    exit 1
    ;;
esac

#!/bin/sh
case "$1" in
  *"rm -rf"*|*"git reset --hard"*)
    echo "blocked destructive command" >&2
    exit 1
    ;;
esac
